title: Sustainability LIVE Returns to Climate Week NYC for Third Consecutive Year
author: Not Specified
description: Sustainability LIVE, a BizClik Media event, will return to New York City on September 22, 2026, at the Javits Center during Climate Week NYC. The one-day executive summit will bring together over 500 C-suite leaders to discuss climate strategy, ESG goals, and sustainability practices. The event features keynote speakers from major corporations including FIFA World Cup 2026, Colgate-Palmolive, DuPont, Marsh, The Adecco Group, and Tate & Lyle, with over 50 expert speakers and interactive workshops.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Chief Sustainability Officer selected as distinguished speaker faculty, demonstrating active engagement in global sustainability leadership and climate strategy.
Chief Sustainability Officer included among distinguished speakers, signaling strong commitment to sustainability and climate action at executive level.
Chief Sustainability Officer featured as speaker, indicating proactive approach to climate risk management and sustainability integration.
Senior Vice President of Sustainability & ESG selected as speaker, demonstrating organizational commitment to sustainability and ESG governance.
Director of Sustainability included in speaker lineup, reflecting active participation in sustainability leadership and climate discourse.

title: Willis announces Corporate Risk & Broking North America growth leadership appointments
author: Not Specified
description: Willis, a WTW business, announced new leadership appointments to strengthen its Corporate Risk & Broking North America division. Michael Butch joins as Growth Operations Leader, bringing over 20 years of sales analytics experience from Marsh. Jim Blaney was appointed Growth Enablement Leader, leveraging his extensive WTW background in sales execution and organic growth. Both executives will report to Chief Growth Officer Paul Graziano and work alongside Strategic Growth Leader Brian Hetherington to accelerate growth and client engagement across North America.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Marsh is mentioned only as the previous employer of Michael Butch. The reference is factual and contextual with no positive or negative implications for Marsh itself.

title: ESET’s Chief Security Evangelist Tony Anscombe to Co-Chair NetDiligence Cyber Risk Summit
author: Not Specified
description: ESET's Chief Security Evangelist Tony Anscombe will co-chair a panel at the NetDiligence Cyber Risk Summit on May 19-20 in San Diego, discussing emerging cyber risks beyond AI including quantum computing, cloud infrastructure, and supply chain vulnerabilities. The panel will explore challenges insurers face in modeling and underwriting these systemic risks.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Marsh is mentioned as a panelist at the summit but without additional context regarding business impact or strategic initiatives.
